targets.rawSql:
WITH latest_qc_summary AS (
            SELECT DISTINCT ON (module_name) *
            FROM module_qc_summary
            ORDER BY module_name, mod_qc_no DESC
        ), 

        latest_iv_test AS (
            SELECT DISTINCT ON (module_name) *
            FROM module_iv_test
            WHERE (module_iv_test.date_test + module_iv_test.time_test)::timestamptz BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
            AND meas_v IS NOT NULL AND meas_i IS NOT NULL
            AND (temp_c::float >= 10 AND temp_c::float <= 30)
            AND (rel_hum::float >= 20)
            AND temp_c ~ '^[-+]?[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$'
            AND rel_hum ~ '^[-+]?[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$'
            AND (status_desc = 'Bolted' )
            AND array_length(meas_v, 1) = array_length(meas_i, 1)
            ORDER BY module_name, date_test DESC
        ),

        selected_modules AS (
        SELECT 
            module_info.module_name
        FROM module_info
        JOIN latest_iv_test ON module_info.module_name = latest_iv_test.module_name
        LEFT JOIN latest_qc_summary ON module_info.module_name = latest_qc_summary.module_name
        WHERE 
                ('All' = ANY(ARRAY[${bp_material}]) OR 
                (module_info.bp_material IS NULL AND 'NULL' = ANY(ARRAY[${bp_material}])) OR 
                module_info.bp_material::text = ANY(ARRAY[${bp_material}])) AND 
                ('All' = ANY(ARRAY[${resolution}]) OR 
                (module_info.resolution IS NULL AND 'NULL' = ANY(ARRAY[${resolution}])) OR 
                module_info.resolution::text = ANY(ARRAY[${resolution}])) AND 
                ('All' = ANY(ARRAY[${roc_version}]) OR 
                (module_info.roc_version IS NULL AND 'NULL' = ANY(ARRAY[${roc_version}])) OR 
                module_info.roc_version::text = ANY(ARRAY[${roc_version}])) AND 
                ('All' = ANY(ARRAY[${geometry}]) OR 
                (module_info.geometry IS NULL AND 'NULL' = ANY(ARRAY[${geometry}])) OR 
                module_info.geometry::text = ANY(ARRAY[${geometry}])) AND 
                ('All' = ANY(ARRAY[${sen_thickness}]) OR 
                (module_info.sen_thickness IS NULL AND 'NULL' = ANY(ARRAY[${sen_thickness}])) OR 
                module_info.sen_thickness::text = ANY(ARRAY[${sen_thickness}]))
            AND 
                ('All' = ANY(ARRAY[${iv_grade}]) OR 
                (latest_qc_summary.iv_grade IS NULL AND 'NULL' = ANY(ARRAY[${iv_grade}])) OR 
                latest_qc_summary.iv_grade::text = ANY(ARRAY[${iv_grade}]))
        ORDER BY module_info.module_no DESC
        LIMIT ${N_MODULE_SHOW}
        ),

        filtered_iv AS (
        SELECT *,
            meas_i[array_length(meas_i, 1)] AS i_last
        FROM module_iv_test
        WHERE
            module_name IN (SELECT module_name FROM selected_modules)
        ),

        best_per_module AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT ON (filtered_iv.module_name) *
        FROM filtered_iv
            WHERE (filtered_iv.date_test + filtered_iv.time_test)::timestamptz BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
            AND (filtered_iv.temp_c::float >= 10 AND filtered_iv.temp_c::float <= 30)
            AND (filtered_iv.rel_hum::float >= 20)
            AND (filtered_iv.status_desc = 'Bolted' )
        ORDER BY filtered_iv.module_name, filtered_iv.mod_ivtest_no DESC
        ),

        unnested AS (
        SELECT 
            module_name,
            ABS(v),
            i,
            date_test,
            time_test,
            ord
        FROM best_per_module,
        UNNEST(meas_v, meas_i) WITH ORDINALITY AS t(v, i, ord)
        )

        SELECT module_name, ABS AS abs, i, date_test, time_test
        FROM unnested
        ORDER BY date_test DESC, time_test DESC, ord ASC;

WITH latest_qc_summary AS (
            SELECT DISTINCT ON (module_name) *
            FROM module_qc_summary
            ORDER BY module_name, mod_qc_no DESC
        ), 

        latest_iv_test AS (
            SELECT DISTINCT ON (module_name) *
            FROM module_iv_test
            WHERE (module_iv_test.date_test + module_iv_test.time_test)::timestamptz BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
            AND meas_v IS NOT NULL AND meas_i IS NOT NULL
            AND (temp_c::float < -30)
            AND (rel_hum::float <= 12)
            AND temp_c ~ '^[-+]?[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$'
            AND rel_hum ~ '^[-+]?[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$'
            AND (status_desc = 'Bolted' )
            AND array_length(meas_v, 1) = array_length(meas_i, 1)
            ORDER BY module_name, date_test DESC
        ),

        selected_modules AS (
        SELECT 
            module_info.module_name
        FROM module_info
        JOIN latest_iv_test ON module_info.module_name = latest_iv_test.module_name
        LEFT JOIN latest_qc_summary ON module_info.module_name = latest_qc_summary.module_name
        WHERE 
                ('All' = ANY(ARRAY[${bp_material}]) OR 
                (module_info.bp_material IS NULL AND 'NULL' = ANY(ARRAY[${bp_material}])) OR 
                module_info.bp_material::text = ANY(ARRAY[${bp_material}])) AND 
                ('All' = ANY(ARRAY[${resolution}]) OR 
                (module_info.resolution IS NULL AND 'NULL' = ANY(ARRAY[${resolution}])) OR 
                module_info.resolution::text = ANY(ARRAY[${resolution}])) AND 
                ('All' = ANY(ARRAY[${roc_version}]) OR 
                (module_info.roc_version IS NULL AND 'NULL' = ANY(ARRAY[${roc_version}])) OR 
                module_info.roc_version::text = ANY(ARRAY[${roc_version}])) AND 
                ('All' = ANY(ARRAY[${geometry}]) OR 
                (module_info.geometry IS NULL AND 'NULL' = ANY(ARRAY[${geometry}])) OR 
                module_info.geometry::text = ANY(ARRAY[${geometry}])) AND 
                ('All' = ANY(ARRAY[${sen_thickness}]) OR 
                (module_info.sen_thickness IS NULL AND 'NULL' = ANY(ARRAY[${sen_thickness}])) OR 
                module_info.sen_thickness::text = ANY(ARRAY[${sen_thickness}]))
            AND 
                ('All' = ANY(ARRAY[${iv_grade}]) OR 
                (latest_qc_summary.iv_grade IS NULL AND 'NULL' = ANY(ARRAY[${iv_grade}])) OR 
                latest_qc_summary.iv_grade::text = ANY(ARRAY[${iv_grade}]))
        ORDER BY module_info.module_no DESC
        LIMIT ${N_MODULE_SHOW}
        ),

        filtered_iv AS (
        SELECT *,
            meas_i[array_length(meas_i, 1)] AS i_last
            
        FROM module_iv_test
        WHERE
            module_name IN (SELECT module_name FROM selected_modules)
        ),

        best_per_module AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT ON (filtered_iv.module_name) *
        FROM filtered_iv
            WHERE (filtered_iv.date_test + filtered_iv.time_test)::timestamptz BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
            AND filtered_iv.meas_v IS NOT NULL AND filtered_iv.meas_i IS NOT NULL
            AND (filtered_iv.temp_c::float < -30)
            AND (filtered_iv.rel_hum::float <= 12)
            AND (filtered_iv.status_desc = 'Bolted' )		
        ORDER BY filtered_iv.module_name, filtered_iv.mod_ivtest_no DESC
        ),

        unnested AS (
        SELECT 
            module_name,
            ABS(v),
            i,
            date_test,
            time_test,
            ord
        FROM best_per_module,
        UNNEST(meas_v, meas_i) WITH ORDINALITY AS t(v, i, ord)
        )

        SELECT module_name, ABS AS abs, i, date_test, time_test
        FROM unnested
        ORDER BY date_test DESC, time_test DESC, ord ASC;

WITH latest_qc_summary AS (
            SELECT DISTINCT ON (module_name) *
            FROM module_qc_summary
            ORDER BY module_name, mod_qc_no DESC
        ), 

        latest_iv_test AS (
            SELECT DISTINCT ON (module_name) *

        selected_modules AS (

list.name: bp_material
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT bp_material::text FROM module_info 
            UNION
            SELECT 'NULL'
            ORDER BY bp_material

list.name: resolution
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT resolution::text FROM module_info 
            UNION
            SELECT 'NULL'
            ORDER BY resolution

list.name: roc_version
list.query:

            UNION
